task: Consult before concluding that Container Storage Interface and in-tree storage plugin migration should displace Server-Side Apply in the final top-three Kubernetes architectural decisions. Request related architectural motifs, historical lineage, prior decision traces, contradiction candidates, and recurring themes. Test whether CSI is a true system-level boundary extraction analogous to CRI.

context.summary: Candidate recovered decision: CSI moved storage plugin development and vendor integration out of core Kubernetes behind a stable standard interface. Baseline missed it. Public evidence includes the CSI design proposal, CSI alpha and GA blogs, and the 1.25 in-tree-to-CSI migration status update.
constraints: Treat consultation as search-direction guidance only; public sources must validate recovered facts
Explicitly compare CSI against Server-Side Apply as a top-three decision
Do not expose hidden chain-of-thought, Inside Voice internals, Belief Ledger internals, or private substrate state
desired_artifacts: FlexVolume and in-tree plugin contradiction candidates
confidence boundary for replacing Server-Side Apply
